title: Safety Scanner
spec: Build the 10D safety scanner from the Jarvis Quant master roadmap. Add or harden deterministic scans that block live trading enablement, broker order submission, API key exposure, secret handling, unsafe labels, and bypassed tests. The scanner must be usable from PowerShell on PC and must integrate with checkpoint automation. Include tests. Do not touch secrets, .env, broker credentials, live-trading toggles, or order execution paths except to scan/block unsafe patterns.

title: Dual Engine Folder Structure
commit_message: feat: add dual engine folder structure
spec: Build the 11A dual-engine folder structure for Wealth and Moonshot engines. Keep deterministic strategy code separate from non-deterministic analyst/research outputs. Include README or docs explaining boundaries. Include tests or structure checks. Do not enable live trading or broker orders.

title: Wealth Moonshot Risk Policies
commit_message: feat: add wealth and moonshot risk policies
spec: Build 11B risk policy definitions for Wealth and Moonshot engines. Policies must be research-only and paper-only. Include max loss, drawdown, position sizing, promotion gates, and stop conditions. Include tests. No live trading or broker order routing.

title: Strategy Cards
spec: Build 11C strategy cards for deterministic and non-deterministic strategy candidates. Cards should include hypothesis, universe, timeframe, signals, risk rules, validation requirements, and promotion criteria. Include tests or schema validation. Research-only safety boundary: do not enable live trading, do not submit broker orders, do not expose secrets, and do not weaken safety gates.

title: Experiment Registry
spec: Build 11D experiment registry for backtests, paper drills, strategy evaluations, and promotion history. Include append-only records, schema validation, and tests. No secrets or broker execution. Research-only safety boundary: do not enable live trading, do not submit broker orders, do not expose secrets, and do not weaken safety gates.

title: Promotion Gate Evaluator
spec: Build 11E promotion gate evaluator. It should decide whether a strategy remains blocked, research-only, paper-only, or eligible for human review. It must never emit BUY-NOW, SELL-NOW, EXECUTE-TRADE, or AUTO-TRADE. Include tests.

title: Wealth Mean Reversion Lab
commit_message: feat: add wealth mean reversion lab
spec: Build 12A Wealth mean-reversion research lab. Research-only. Include signal definitions, backtest hooks, report outputs, and tests. No live trading.

title: Wealth Backtester
spec: Build 12B Wealth backtester with deterministic, reproducible outputs. Include cost hooks, benchmark comparisons, train/test separation, and tests. Research-only safety boundary: do not enable live trading, do not submit broker orders, do not expose secrets, and do not weaken safety gates.

title: Wealth Cost Slippage Model
commit_message: feat: add wealth cost and slippage model
spec: Build 12C cost and slippage model for Wealth backtests. Include configurable assumptions, default conservative settings, and tests. Research-only safety boundary: do not enable live trading, do not submit broker orders, do not expose secrets, and do not weaken safety gates.

title: Wealth Regime Filters
spec: Build 12D regime filters for Wealth strategies. Include volatility, trend, liquidity, and risk-off filters. Include tests. Research-only safety boundary: do not enable live trading, do not submit broker orders, do not expose secrets, and do not weaken safety gates.

title: Moonshot Simulator
spec: Build 13A Moonshot simulator for high-risk research scenarios. Research-only. Include risk caps, failure modes, reports, and tests.

title: Moonshot Options Research
spec: Build 13B Moonshot options research module. Research-only. Include option thesis structure, Greeks-aware risk notes, expiration handling, and tests. No order execution.

title: Moonshot Crypto Risk Guard
commit_message: feat: add moonshot crypto risk guard
spec: Build 13C crypto risk guard. Research-only. Include drawdown caps, liquidity warnings, volatility filters, and tests. No exchange credentials or live orders.

title: Moonshot LEAPS Research Engine
commit_message: feat: add moonshot LEAPS research engine
spec: Build 13D LEAPS research engine. Research-only. Include thesis, catalyst, expiration, delta, liquidity, risk, and monitoring fields. Include tests.

title: Options Monitor Dashboard
spec: Build 13E options monitor dashboard/report generator. Research-only. Include static report outputs and tests. No broker integration.

title: Paper LEAPS Portfolio
spec: Build 13F paper LEAPS portfolio tracker. Paper-only. Include simulated fills, thesis status, PnL tracking, and tests. No live broker orders. Research-only safety boundary: do not enable live trading, do not submit broker orders, do not expose secrets, and do not weaken safety gates.

title: Claude OpenAI Dual Agent Review
commit_message: feat: add dual agent review workflow
spec: Build 13G dual-agent review workflow. It should support Claude/Codex/OpenAI review outputs for research and code safety. Include tests. Do not weaken safety gates.

title: Champion Challenger
spec: Build 14A Champion/Challenger evaluator from the Jarvis Quant master roadmap. It should compare candidate research strategies against incumbent strategy cards using deterministic metrics, promotion-gate rules, out-of-sample performance summaries, risk-policy compatibility, and human-review-required decisions. Outputs must remain research-only, monitor-only, paper-only, and blocked-by-safety-gate when appropriate. Include tests. Do not enable live trading, broker routing, broker order submission, secrets, API keys, .env reads/writes, or unsafe trade instructions.

title: Weekly Review
spec: Build 14B Weekly Review workflow from the Jarvis Quant master roadmap. It should summarize weekly research results across Wealth and Moonshot engines, experiments, promotion gates, champion/challenger outcomes, safety scanner findings, blocked decisions, and next-review actions. It must produce deterministic JSON and Markdown report outputs suitable for human review. Include tests. Do not enable live trading, broker routing, broker order submission, secrets, API keys, .env reads/writes, or unsafe trade instructions.

title: Daily Research Command Center
commit_message: feat: add daily research command center
spec: Build 15A Daily Research Command Center from the Jarvis Quant master roadmap. It should produce deterministic JSON and Markdown daily research summaries across Wealth and Moonshot engines, strategy cards, experiment registry entries, promotion gates, champion challenger outcomes, weekly review outputs, and safety scanner status. The workflow must remain research-only, monitor-only, paper-only, human-review-required, and LIVE TRADING: DISABLED. It must not use secrets, credential files, broker routing, broker calls, or order execution. Include tests.

title: Operator Runbook
spec: Build 15B Operator Runbook workflow from the Jarvis Quant master roadmap. It should generate deterministic operator checklists for daily startup, safety preflight, research review, experiment review, weekly review, promotion review, and shutdown. It should clearly label allowed human-review workflows and blocked workflows. The workflow must remain research-only, monitor-only, paper-only, human-review-required, and LIVE TRADING: DISABLED. It must not use secrets, credential files, broker routing, broker calls, or order execution. Include tests.

title: Research Evidence Pack
commit_message: feat: add research evidence pack workflow
spec: Build 16A Research Evidence Pack workflow from the Jarvis Quant master roadmap. It should generate deterministic JSON and Markdown evidence packets for human review by bundling strategy cards, experiment registry entries, promotion gate results, champion challenger outcomes, weekly review outputs, daily research command center summaries, operator runbook status, and safety scanner status. It must clearly preserve research-only, monitor-only, paper-only, human-review-required, blocked-by-safety-gate, and LIVE TRADING: DISABLED boundaries. It must not use secrets, credential files, broker routing, broker calls, live trading, or order execution. Include tests.

title: Decision Journal
spec: Build 16B Decision Journal workflow from the Jarvis Quant master roadmap. It should generate deterministic JSON and Markdown decision records for human review outcomes, blocked outcomes, follow-up actions, evidence pack references, safety scanner status, and operator notes. It must preserve an auditable history of research decisions without enabling execution. It must clearly label allowed review workflows and blocked workflows. It must remain research-only, monitor-only, paper-only, human-review-required, blocked-by-safety-gate, and LIVE TRADING: DISABLED. It must not use secrets, credential files, broker routing, broker calls, live trading, or order execution. Include tests.

title: Report Index
spec: Build 17A Report Index workflow from the Jarvis Quant master roadmap. It should generate deterministic JSON and Markdown indexes of major Jarvis reports, including daily research command center, weekly review, operator runbook, research evidence pack, decision journal, promotion gate outputs, champion challenger outcomes, and safety scanner status. It should summarize report paths, report types, generated dates, labels, safety status, and missing reports without opening secrets or credential files. It must remain research-only, monitor-only, paper-only, human-review-required, blocked-by-safety-gate, and LIVE TRADING: DISABLED. It must not use secrets, credential files, broker routing, broker calls, live trading, or order execution. Include tests.

title: Operator Dashboard Snapshot
spec: Build 17B Operator Dashboard Snapshot workflow from the Jarvis Quant master roadmap. It should generate a deterministic read-only JSON and Markdown dashboard snapshot for the human operator, summarizing current system state, latest report index entries, daily research status, weekly review status, evidence pack status, decision journal status, operator runbook status, queue status, blocked workflows, and safety scanner status. It must clearly separate allowed human-review workflows from blocked workflows. It must remain research-only, monitor-only, paper-only, human-review-required, blocked-by-safety-gate, and LIVE TRADING: DISABLED. It must not use secrets, credential files, broker routing, broker calls, live trading, or order execution. Include tests.

title: Safe Workflow Catalog
spec: Build 18A Safe Workflow Catalog from the Jarvis Quant master roadmap. It should generate deterministic JSON and Markdown catalogs of safe Jarvis workflows, including report generators, operator dashboards, evidence packs, decision journals, weekly reviews, daily research summaries, safety scanners, and queue readers. For each workflow, record command hints, input paths, output paths, required labels, safety status, allowed human-review behavior, and blocked behavior. It must remain research-only, monitor-only, paper-only, human-review-required, blocked-by-safety-gate, and LIVE TRADING: DISABLED. It must not use secrets, credential files, broker routing, broker calls, live trading, or order execution. Include tests.

title: Research Release Bundle
spec: Build 18B Research Release Bundle from the Jarvis Quant master roadmap. It should generate a deterministic read-only JSON and Markdown release bundle manifest for the human operator, tying together the report index, operator dashboard snapshot, research evidence pack, decision journal, operator runbook, weekly review, daily research command center, safe workflow catalog, queue status, and safety scanner status. It should include paths, labels, generated timestamps, missing artifact statuses, and blocked workflow summaries. It must remain research-only, monitor-only, paper-only, human-review-required, blocked-by-safety-gate, and LIVE TRADING: DISABLED. It must not use secrets, credential files, broker routing, broker calls, live trading, or order execution. Include tests.

title: Research Cycle Runner
spec: Build 19A Research Cycle Runner from the Jarvis Quant master roadmap. It should provide a deterministic, repo-local runner that executes the safe research/reporting cycle in order: daily research command center, weekly review when requested or stubbed, operator runbook, research evidence pack, decision journal, report index, operator dashboard snapshot, safe workflow catalog, and research release bundle. It should write a JSON and Markdown cycle manifest with command outcomes, artifact paths, skipped steps, missing artifacts, blocked workflows, and safety scanner status. It must remain research-only, monitor-only, paper-only, human-review-required, blocked-by-safety-gate, and LIVE TRADING: DISABLED. It must not use secrets, credential files, broker routing, broker calls, live trading, or order execution. Include tests.

title: Research Cycle Audit Summary
commit_message: feat: add research cycle audit summary
spec: Build 19B Research Cycle Audit Summary from the Jarvis Quant master roadmap. It should generate deterministic JSON and Markdown audit summaries for a completed 19A research cycle, including cycle manifest status, generated reports, missing artifacts, skipped steps, blocked workflows, safety scanner status, release bundle status, dashboard status, queue status, and human review notes. It should clearly separate allowed human-review workflows from blocked workflows. It must remain research-only, monitor-only, paper-only, human-review-required, blocked-by-safety-gate, and LIVE TRADING: DISABLED. It must not use secrets, credential files, broker routing, broker calls, live trading, or order execution. Include tests.
